channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Vue.js Pro - Sat Jun 06 13:22:39 UTC 2026
item.description:
Vue.js Pro brings Vue 3 Single File Component support to IntelliJ-based IDEs, including project creation, editor assistance, navigation, inspections, refactoring, and...
vendor: Jetplugins downloads: 2 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: dev.jetplugins.vuejs

item.title: AI Agent Workspace Guard - Fri Jun 05 11:00:45 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Claude Config Manager - Mon Jun 08 11:59:12 UTC 2026

item.title: o2commit - Mon Jun 08 16:53:58 UTC 2026
item.description:
